identity: Human female pyromancer, young adult, long wavy auburn-red hair falling to the shoulders, warm brown eyes, calm confident face.
outfit: Deep-red hooded robe with a yellow-gold flame emblem on the chest, gold trim along the hood and front seam.
weapons: No staff — uses bare hands. A plume of orange-yellow fire always flickers in the left palm when conjured.
attackStyle: East-facing. Left hand thrust forward hurling a large orange fireball, right hand drawn back, robe billowing.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both palms held forward cupping a swirling orange-yellow flame, hood up, serene face.
blockStyle: East-facing. Both arms crossed in front of the chest, flames flaring protectively around her.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, flames extinguished, head bowed, hood slumped, hands limp in her lap.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Left hand held out to the side with a small flickering flame in the palm, right hand at her side, hood up.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep-red hood with gold trim, long wavy auburn-red hair, warm brown eyes, yellow-gold flame emblem on the chest, a small plume of fire in the left palm.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female pyromancer, young adult, long wavy auburn-red hair falling to the shoulders, warm brown eyes, calm confident face.

OUTFIT: Deep-red hooded robe with a yellow-gold flame emblem on the chest, gold trim along the hood and front seam.

WEAPONS: No staff — uses bare hands. A plume of orange-yellow fire always flickers in the left palm when conjured.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female pyromancer, young adult, long wavy auburn-red hair falling to the shoulders, warm brown eyes, calm confident face.

OUTFIT: Deep-red hooded robe with a yellow-gold flame emblem on the chest, gold trim along the hood and front seam.

WEAPONS: No staff — uses bare hands. A plume of orange-yellow fire always flickers in the left palm when conjured.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep-red hood with gold trim, long wavy auburn-red hair, warm brown eyes, yellow-gold flame emblem on the chest, a small plume of fire in the left palm.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
